creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
I get the following leftovers:

list of extra files and directories in / (not present on clean system but present after everything was deinstalled)
10794510        4 -rw-r--r--    1 root             wheel                 903 Aug 10 14:27 usr/local/man/man1/atari-hd-image.1.gz
10794515        4 -rw-r--r--    1 root             wheel                1254 Aug 10 14:27 usr/local/man/man1/hconsole.1.gz
10794514        4 -rw-r--r--    1 root             wheel                1105 Aug 10 14:27 usr/local/man/man1/hmsa.1.gz
10794511        4 -rw-r--r--    1 root             wheel                 848 Aug 10 14:27 usr/local/man/man1/zip2st.1.gz

Could you please invetigate?
